name: Chicken and Ham Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 chicken breast fillet, skinned and sliced thinly
3/4 pint chicken stock made with liquid concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, courgettes, mushrooms, ham, and onions in a pan.
2. Add the chicken stock and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, blend the soy sauce with the corn flour until smooth.
5. Stir the mixture into the pan constantly until the soup thickens.
6. Serve immediately.
